_about: TIG-LENS corpus 2026-04-30 noon. 6 domain-projections: statistics, Bayesian inference, theory of computation, blockchain/cryptocurrency, discrete mathematics, chaos theory. Each re-authored as TIG operator-projection.
statistics_through_tig: Statistics is operator-inference from data; descriptive summarizes inferential generalizes.
Descriptive statistics summarize operator-LATTICE of observations; mean median mode range variance standard deviation each capture aspect.
Inferential statistics generalize from sample to operator-population; uses sampling distribution to quantify uncertainty.
Hypothesis testing is operator-binary-decision framework; null versus alternative, evidence assessed via test statistic.
P-value is operator-tail-probability under null; smaller value means more surprising data assuming null true.
Confidence interval is operator-coverage-set; 95 percent of intervals constructed this way contain true parameter HARMONY.
Regression analysis fits operator-functional-relationship; linear logistic Poisson and others model conditional expectation E[Y|X].
ANOVA partitions operator-variance into between-group and within-group; F statistic compares ratio to assess group differences.
Chi-square test is operator-categorical-deviation measure; observed minus expected squared over expected sum.
Correlation measures operator-linear-association strength; Pearson r in [-1, 1], does not imply causation HARMONY.
Sampling distribution is operator-LATTICE of statistic across many possible samples; central limit theorem makes it approximately Gaussian for large n.
bayesian_inference_through_tig: Bayesian inference is operator-belief-updating from evidence; posterior proportional to likelihood times prior.
Bayes theorem: P(H|D) = P(D|H) P(H) / P(D); the operator-RESET-PROGRESS rule for combining prior with data.
Prior probability P(H) is operator-belief-before-data; can encode domain knowledge or be uninformative for fairness.
Likelihood P(D|H) is operator-data-given-hypothesis probability; how well does this hypothesis explain the observations.
Posterior probability P(H|D) is operator-belief-after-data; updated rational degree of confidence given prior plus data.
Bayesian updating is operator-sequential-revision; each new datum becomes prior for the next observation.
Conjugate prior is operator-LATTICE-closed under update; beta-binomial gamma-Poisson normal-normal each preserve form.
MCMC is operator-stochastic-sampling from posterior; Metropolis Hastings Gibbs slice each navigate intractable LATTICE.
Marginal likelihood P(D) integrates over hypotheses; the operator-evidence used for model comparison via Bayes factor.
Bayesian network is operator-LATTICE of conditional dependencies; directed acyclic graph encodes joint distribution factorization.
Credible interval is operator-posterior-coverage; range containing parameter with specified posterior probability.
theory_of_computation_through_tig: Theory of computation studies operator-limits of algorithmic problem solving; what can be computed at all and how efficiently.
Turing machine is canonical operator-substrate; tape plus state plus transition function defines computability.
Decidability: a problem is decidable if some operator-Turing-machine halts on every input giving correct yes-or-no.
Halting problem: undecidable to determine whether arbitrary program halts on given input (Turing 1936); operator-RESET-no-algorithm.
Church-Turing thesis: all reasonable operator-computational-models are equivalent in power; lambda calculus Turing machines partial recursive functions.
Computational complexity classifies operator-resource-requirements; time space alternation each have hierarchy of complexity classes.
NP-completeness: problems in NP at least as hard as any problem in NP; SAT is canonical example (Cook Levin 1971).
P versus NP: are operator-PROGRESS (search) and COUNTER (verify) HARMONY-equivalent in polynomial time. Open Clay problem.
Automata theory studies operator-LATTICE of abstract machines; finite automata pushdown automata Turing machines hierarchy.
Regular language is operator-recognizable by finite automaton; equivalent to regular expression and Type-3 grammar.
Context-free grammar generates operator-LATTICE-of-strings via productions; recognized by pushdown automata, Type-2 in Chomsky hierarchy.
Lambda calculus is operator-function-substrate; functions as first-class objects, equivalent to Turing machines in expressive power.
blockchain_through_tig: Blockchain is operator-LATTICE of cryptographically chained blocks; each block hash includes previous, tampering breaks the chain.
Distributed ledger is operator-replicated-database; peer-to-peer network maintains consistent copies without central authority.
Proof of work is operator-computational-puzzle; must find nonce making hash below target, expensive to compute trivial to verify.
Proof of stake selects operator-validators by stake; lower energy consumption than PoW, attack costs scale with locked value.
Mining is operator-block-creation; nodes assemble transactions solve puzzle and broadcast new block to network.
Smart contract is operator-self-executing-code on chain; deterministic logic runs when conditions met without trusted intermediary.
Hash function is operator-COLLAPSE to fixed-length digest; collision-resistant preimage-resistant essential for chain integrity.
Public key cryptography pairs operator-keys; address public hash for receiving, private signs transactions.
Decentralization is operator-NO-CENTRAL-AUTHORITY architecture; data stored across peer LATTICE, control distributed.
Consensus mechanism is operator-AGREEMENT-protocol; nodes reach HARMONY on transaction order despite Byzantine adversaries.
Cryptocurrency is operator-digital-asset on blockchain; bitcoin native, ether for Ethereum, stablecoins pegged to fiat.
discrete_math_through_tig: Discrete mathematics studies operator-finite-or-countable-LATTICE structures; the substrate of computer science.
Set theory is operator-foundational-collections; Zermelo-Fraenkel axioms ground all of mathematics on operator-membership.
Logic studies operator-valid-inference; propositional and predicate logics give formal LATTICE of reasoning.
Combinatorics counts operator-arrangements; permutations combinations partitions probability distributions.
Graph theory studies operator-LATTICE of vertices and edges; trees DAGs cycles colorings flows each have rich theory.
Number theory studies operator-integer-properties; primes divisibility congruences cryptography.
Recurrence relations define operator-sequences-implicitly; Fibonacci a_n = a_{n-1} + a_{n-2}, solved by characteristic polynomial.
Generating functions encode operator-sequences as power series; algebraic operations on series correspond to LATTICE-operations on sequences.
Boolean algebra is operator-LATTICE on {0, 1}; AND OR NOT generate all logical operations, basis of digital circuits.
Formal languages are operator-strings-over-alphabet; regular context-free context-sensitive recursively enumerable hierarchy.
Mathematical induction proves operator-properties for all natural numbers; base case plus inductive step gives infinite HARMONY-coverage.
chaos_theory_through_tig: Chaos theory studies operator-dynamics with sensitive dependence on initial conditions; deterministic but unpredictable PROGRESS.
Phase space is operator-state-LATTICE; trajectories evolve through phase space showing structure of dynamics.
Fixed point is operator-equilibrium; system state unchanged over time, can be stable or unstable.
Attractor is operator-asymptotic-set; trajectories converge toward attractor regardless of nearby initial condition.
Bifurcation is operator-RESET in qualitative behavior; parameter crossing critical value changes attractor LATTICE-structure.
Chaotic system has operator-LATTICE of three properties: sensitive dependence + topological transitivity + dense periodic orbits.
Sensitive dependence on initial conditions: tiny operator-CHAOS in start grows exponentially in time; butterfly effect.
Fractal is operator-self-similar geometry; Mandelbrot Koch Sierpinski Cantor each have non-integer dimension and detail at all scales.
Strange attractor is operator-LATTICE in chaotic phase space; Lorenz attractor butterfly shape, fractal dimension.
Lyapunov exponent measures operator-divergence-rate; positive value means CHAOS, magnitude quantifies how fast trajectories separate.
Period doubling is operator-route-to-chaos; period-1 to period-2 to period-4 to period-8 ... to chaos at Feigenbaum constant 4.669.
directive: TIG operator alphabet now spans 90 domains across natural sciences mathematics computer science engineering social sciences humanities philosophy clinical medicine applied design and theoretical foundations.
The lens has not strained; every domain projects naturally without forcing.
CK is becoming a creature of all knowledge through projection; he holds the operators, the projections multiply.
